translations.form.rules.title: Server Rules
translations.form.rules.content:
&4&lNOTE: &r&6Every player on the server is considered to have read and accepted the rules, as we stated upon entering the server!

&cUse of Cheats
&3The use of cheats is strictly prohibited in any case.
When a person is confirmed to be using cheats with visual evidence, they will be removed from the server for 15-30 days immediately without warning.

&cServer Advertisement
&3Advertising other servers is prohibited.
Advertisers will be removed from the server for 1-15 days without warning.

&cAccount Buying-Selling
&3The sale of any product or data owned in-game for real money, or trading it for another product accessed with real money, is strictly prohibited.
If it is proven that trading is done with real money, both parties will be removed from the server for 15-30 days without warning.
In cases where trading with real money is offered but not realized, a 5-day suspension will be applied.

&cScamming
&3Scamming and fraud are against our rules and strictly prohibited.
Actions such as stealing other players' in-game products or taking items or money by deceiving them are unacceptable.
The penalty for such behavior is 15-30 days of suspension.

&cInsult-Profanity-Flood-Spam
&3Cursing or insulting other players, causing disturbance, and flooding or spamming in the chat section is prohibited.
Those who commit these offenses will be given a 1-15 Day or indefinite mute penalty.

&cSlander
&3Slandering other players, threatening them, cursing them, fighting, and disturbing the general peace of the server is prohibited.
If these behaviors do not include insults or profanity, the penalty is applied as a mute between 6 hours and 1 day.
However, if it contains profanity or insults, the mute duration of the profanity penalty is added on top of this penalty.

&cMisrepresentation
&3It is prohibited to introduce yourself as an official or another player in the chat section, or to write using someone else's name or rank.

&cReligious National Value
&3In case of insult or disrespect to any religious or national value, the player will be removed from the server for 15-30 days.

&cExcessive Slang
&3The use of excessive slang, writing too much obscene content, or +18 messages is strictly prohibited.
&3This rule was added to protect young players on the server.
The penalty is determined as 1-15 days suspension.

&cExploiting In-Game Bugs
&3Exploiting the vulnerabilities of the server and the game is prohibited.
&3A player must share a bug with the administrators as soon as they find it.
&3We also want you to know that we reward our players who share important bugs with us.
&3Persons using bugs will be removed from the server indefinitely without warning.

&cBasic Provisions
&3Harassing or disturbing other players is prohibited. Also, sending messages that provoke players is prohibited.
&3Sharing other players' account information is strictly prohibited. Persons sharing passwords, emails, or other information that the player does not want to be shared will be removed from the server indefinitely.
&3Spreading false information about the server or officials, or spreading statements that will damage the reputation of the server or officials, is prohibited.
&3Farming statistics and money with side accounts is prohibited. Players who bring their side accounts into the game and kill them to gain profit on the servers will receive a 30-day suspension from the server.
&3Farming unfair statistics and money by agreeing with other players is prohibited.
&3Swearing through methods other than chat (books, commands, etc.) will result in a temporary mute penalty.
&3Entering other players' accounts and exchanging data without their permission, such as stealing accounts or robbing accounts, is prohibited. If it is proven that a player stole and robbed an account, they will be removed from the server indefinitely.
